title: The Legend of Zelda: The Hero of Time
original_title: The Legend of Zelda: The Hero of Time
overview: Link, after doubting his relation to the people of the Kokiri Forest leaves to find out his real heritage. But he is dragged into becoming the chosen to defeat the tyrannical Ganondorf and save Hyrule and the imprissoned Princess Zelda.
